name: Vault Default
postStartCommand: mkdir -p /run/postgresql /var/log/postgresql && chown -R postgres /run/postgresql /var/log/postgresql && su postgres -c 'initdb -D /var/lib/postgresql/data || true' && su postgres -c 'pg_ctl -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -l /var/log/postgresql/postgresql.log start' && sleep 2 && su postgres -c "psql -c \"CREATE USER vaultuser WITH SUPERUSER PASSWORD 'vaultpass';\"" || true && vault server -dev -dev-root-token-id=root & sleep 2 && vault secrets enable -path=secrets kv && vault auth enable approle && vault secrets enable database && vault write database/config/meu-postgres plugin_name=postgresql-database-plugin allowed_roles=minha-role connection_url='postgresql://{{username}}:{{password}}@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable' username=vaultuser password=vaultpass && vault write database/roles/minha-role db_name=meu-postgres creation_statements="CREATE ROLE \"{{name}}\" WITH LOGIN PASSWORD '{{password}}' VALID UNTIL '{{expiration}}'; GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO \"{{name}}\";" default_ttl=1h max_ttl=24h
